ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify where we should look for tasks. Choose "/" to look in the whole vault.
ast.target: 指定我们应该在哪里查找任务。选择 \"/\" 以在整个保险库中查找。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable "Save calendar to the web" below and trigger a save, then click Refresh.
ast.target: 启用下方的“将日历保存到网络”并触发一次保存，然后点击刷新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check your secret key and network connection, then click Refresh.
ast.target: 请检查您的密钥和网络连接，然后点击刷新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turning this on will save your calendar to your private area on https://obsidian-ical.com
ast.target: 开启此选项将把您的日历保存到您在 https://obsidian-ical.com 上的私人区域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if you want your calendar to ignore tasks that have been completed.
ast.target: 选择是否希望您的日历忽略已完成的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose if you want your calendar to ignore tasks that have been cancelled (e.g. - [-] in Obsidian Tasks). Defaults to true since cancelled work is usually not something you want on your calendar.
ast.target: 选择是否希望您的日历忽略已取消的任务（例如 Obsidian Tasks 中的 - [-]）。默认为 true，因为已取消的工作通常不是您希望出现在日历上的内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Normally, we add your tasks as normal calendar events. You can choose to add your tasks as TODO items as well. Or you could add your tasks as calendar events as well as TODO items.
ast.target: 通常，我们会将您的任务添加为普通日历事件。您也可以选择将任务添加为待办事项。或者，您也可以同时将任务添加为日历事件和待办事项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When adding the TODO items to your calendar, should we only consider tasks without dates as TODO items?
ast.target: 将待办事项添加到日历时，是否只将没有日期的任务视为待办事项？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do you want to exclude tasks if they are older than a certain age? This could be useful if you have a very large number of tasks and are not interested in the past.
ast.target: 您是否希望排除超过一定时间的任务？如果您有大量任务且对过去的内容不感兴趣，这可能很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If every date for a given task is more than this many days ago then it will be excluded from your calendar.
ast.target: 如果给定任务的所有日期都早于指定的天数，那么它将被排除在您的日历之外。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A task can have many dates (eg: due, start, scheduled, etc). When multiple dates are encountered in a task, which date do you want to use for the calendar?
ast.target: 一个任务可以有多个日期（例如：截止日期、开始日期、计划日期等）。当任务中遇到多个日期时，您希望日历使用哪个日期？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn this on if you want to support the Day Planner plugin format.
ast.target: 如果您想支持 Day Planner 插件格式，请开启此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do you want your calendar to only include tasks that contain certain tags?
ast.target: 您是否希望您的日历只包含带有特定标签的任务？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one or more tags. Separate multiple tags with a space. If one or more of these tags are found then the task will be included in your calendar.
ast.target: 输入一个或多个标签。多个标签用空格分隔。如果找到一个或多个这些标签，则该任务将包含在您的日历中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do you want your calendar to exclude tasks that contain certain tags?
ast.target: 您是否希望您的日历排除带有特定标签的任务？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one or more tags. Separate multiple tags with a space. If one or more of these tags are found then the task will be excluded from your calendar.
ast.target: 输入一个或多个标签。多个标签用空格分隔。如果找到一个或多个这些标签，则该任务将被排除在您的日历之外。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do you want the plugin to periodically process your tasks? If you choose not to then a calendar will only be built when Obsidian is loaded.
ast.target: 您是否希望插件定期处理您的任务？如果选择不处理，则日历仅在 Obsidian 加载时构建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often do you want to periodically scan for tasks?
ast.target: 您希望多久定期扫描一次任务？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How should [[wikilinks]] and [markdown links](markdown links) be processed if they are encountered in a task?
ast.target: 如果在任务中遇到 [[wikilinks]] 和 [markdown links](markdown links)，应该如何处理？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include a link to open the task in Obsidian in the event description. This is useful for clients such as Thunderbird or Evolution.
ast.target: 在事件描述中包含一个链接，用于在 Obsidian 中打开任务。这对于 Thunderbird 或 Evolution 等客户端很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include a link to open the task in Obsidian as the event location. Disable this if your calendar client treats the LOCATION field as a physical address.
ast.target: 包含一个链接，用于在 Obsidian 中打开任务作为事件位置。如果您的日历客户端将 LOCATION 字段视为物理地址，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to privately store your calendar on Github
ast.target: 用于在 Github 上私下存储您的日历

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the unique ID to the Gist that you created in GitHub
ast.target: 这是您在 GitHub 中创建的 Gist 的唯一 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is only used to generate the URL to your calendar
ast.target: 这仅用于生成日历的 URL

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Give your calendar a file name
ast.target: 为您的日历指定一个文件名

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which directory/folder do you want to save your calendar to? An empty string means to the current vault root path. The path must be inside the vault.
ast.target: 您希望将日历保存到哪个目录/文件夹？空字符串表示当前保险库根路径。路径必须在保险库内。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The file extension must be one of .ical or .ics or .ifb or .icalendar
ast.target: 文件扩展名必须是 .ical、.ics、.ifb 或 .icalendar 之一

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turning this on will write logs to console.
ast.target: 开启此选项将把日志写入控制台。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将日历保存到 GitHub Gist？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add tasks as TODO items to your calendar
ast.target: 将任务作为待办事项添加到您的日历

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Only tasks without dates are TODO items
ast.target: 仅无日期的任务为待办事项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How many days back to you want to keep old tasks?
ast.target: 您希望保留多少天前的旧任务？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Which task date should be used?

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 支持 Day Planner 插件？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Only include tasks with certain tags?
ast.target: 仅包含带有特定标签的任务？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Only include tasks that contain these tags
ast.target: 仅包含包含这些标签的任务

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 排除带有特定标签的任务？

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude tasks that contain these tags
ast.target: 排除包含这些标签的任务

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How often should we parse and save your calendar? (minutes)
ast.target: 我们应多久解析并保存一次您的日历？（分钟）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add link to Obsidian in event description
ast.target: 在事件描述中添加指向 Obsidian 的链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include link to Obsidian as event location
ast.target: 将指向 Obsidian 的链接作为事件位置

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Re-fetch calendar info from the server
ast.target: 从服务器重新获取日历信息

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No calendar found yet. Enable "Save calendar to the web" and trigger a save to create one.
ast.target: 尚未找到日历。启用“将日历保存到网络”并触发一次保存以创建日历。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't refresh calendar info. Check your secret key and network connection.
ast.target: 无法刷新日历信息。请检查您的密钥和网络连接。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Calendar not found for this vault
ast.target: 未找到此保险库的日历

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在 obsidian-ical.com 上创建账户

ast.name: text
ast.source: 📅 Your calendar URL will appear here after your first save to the web.
ast.target: 📅 首次保存到网络后，您的日历 URL 将显示在此处。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Perform the following steps to get your Personal Access Token and Gist ID:
ast.target: 执行以下步骤以获取您的个人访问令牌和 Gist ID：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Go to https://github.com/settings/tokens/new and create a new personal access token. It only needs Gist scope.
ast.target: 访问 https://github.com/settings/tokens/new 并创建一个新的个人访问令牌。它只需要 Gist 范围。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Go to https://gist.github.com/ and create a new secret Gist.
ast.target: 访问 https://gist.github.com/ 并创建一个新的私密 Gist。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Link to Task Lists on on obsidian.md (https://help.obsidian.md/syntax#Task+lists)
ast.target: 指向 obsidian.md 上任务列表的链接 (https://help.obsidian.md/syntax#Task+lists)
